description: Accounts. Yemeni hand? Recto is in Judaeo-Arabic and verso is in Arabic script. Dated: Monday, 20 Iyyar 2143 Seleucid = 20 May 1832 CE. Currency: qurūsh. Referring to slaughtering cows, maybe state property (? baqar al-dawla). Needs examination.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה בArabic, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
